title: Meow!
description: MEOW! - YOU can finally meow in Minecraft.
body:
![TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff1db3540bd4e50258899461572f24da6a80e2bb.png)

## MEOW! - YOU can finally meow in Minecraft!
**With this mod, you can set a keybind to meow.**

If you press the set keybind, you will play a cat meowing sound where you stand. That's it.

(Inspired by the Rainworld Meow Mod.)
